_publications._publicationTitle: Combined MEK inhibition and BMP2 treatment promotes osteoblast differentiation and bone healing in Nf1Osx -/- mice.

_contextSnippet: ...BMSCs from Nf1 mice formed significantly less CFU-Ap and CFU-Ob colonies than BMSCs from WT littermates...significant decrease in the expression of major osteoblast marker genes...
details: BMSCs formed significantly less CFU-Ap and CFU-Ob colonies than WT littermates, with significant decrease in osteoblast marker genes (Alpl, Runx2, Osx, Col1a1, Ocn)
